parameters.query:
SELECT 
  pm.material_type,
  pm.trade,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(pm.quantity) as total_quantity,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pm.product_id IS NULL) as needs_assignment
FROM project_materials pm
WHERE pm.project_id = '{{ $('Extract Project ID').item.json.project_id }}'::uuid
GROUP BY pm.material_type, pm.trade
ORDER BY count DESC;

INSERT INTO events (
  event_type,
  project_id,
  source_system,
  source_flow,
  payload,
  dedupe_key
) VALUES (
  'MATERIALS_PLANNED',
  '{{ $('Extract Project ID').item.json.project_id }}'::uuid,
  'n8n',
  'M4_01_Material_Planner',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({
    positions_processed: $('Generate Materials').first().json.positions_processed,
    materials_created: $('Generate Materials').first().json.materials_created,
    summary: $('Get Summary').all().map(i => i.json)
  }) }}'::jsonb,
  'materials_planned_' || '{{ $('Extract Project ID').item.json.project_id }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (source_system, dedupe_key) WHERE dedupe_key IS NOT NULL 
DO UPDATE SET
  payload = EXCLUDED.payload,
  created_at = now()
RETURNING id, event_type::text, project_id;

INSERT INTO events (
  event_type,
  project_id,
  source_system,
  source_flow,
  payload,
  dedupe_key
) VALUES (
  'MATERIALS_NEED_ASSIGNMENT',
  '{{ $('Extract Project ID').first().json.project_id }}'::uuid,
  'n8n',
  'M4_01_Material_Planner',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({
    unassigned_count: $('Check Unassigned').first().json.unassigned_count
  }) }}'::jsonb,
  'materials_need_assignment_' || '{{ $('Extract Project ID').first().json.project_id }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (source_system, dedupe_key) WHERE dedupe_key IS NOT NULL
DO UPDATE SET
  payload = EXCLUDED.payload,
  created_at = now()
RETURNING id;
